groups.title: Output
groups.description: Output mode, output priority, nominal output voltage, and remote output state.

groups.title: Charging
groups.description: Battery type, charging current, charging method, and charging voltage settings.

groups.title: Battery
groups.description: Battery protection, BMS communication, and equalization behavior.

groups.title: System
groups.description: General inverter feature toggles and grid protection settings.

capabilities.title: Maximum Charging Current
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the maximum total battery charging current. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Maximum Utility Charging Current
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the maximum utility/grid charging current. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Charging Method
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the charging method. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Constant Voltage Charging Voltage
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the constant-voltage charge point for a 24 V battery profile. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Float Charging Voltage
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the float charge voltage for a 24 V battery profile. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Equalization Charging Voltage
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the equalization charge voltage for a 24 V battery profile. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Constant Voltage Charging Time
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the constant-voltage charge duration. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Equalization Charging Time
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the equalization charge duration. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Equalization Timeout
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the equalization timeout/delay. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Equalization Interval
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the equalization interval. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Battery Discharge Cut-Off Voltage
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery low-voltage shutdown point for a 24 V battery profile. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Battery Discharge Alarm Voltage
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery low-voltage alarm point for a 24 V battery profile. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Low-Power Discharge Time
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the low-power discharge time in appliance mode. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Battery-To-Grid Voltage
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery voltage threshold for switching back to grid. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Grid-To-Battery Voltage
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery voltage threshold for switching back to battery. 0.0 V means return after reaching float mode. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Battery Over-Voltage Protection Voltage
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery over-voltage protection point for a 24 V battery profile. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Grid Over-Voltage Protection
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the grid over-voltage protection point. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Grid Under-Voltage Protection
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the grid under-voltage protection point. The valid sub-range depends on APP/UPS output mode. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: Constant-Current Charging Max Time
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the maximum constant-current charging time. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: BMS Low SOC Shutdown
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.

visible_if.reason: BMS telemetry is not available on this device.

capabilities.change_summary: Changes the BMS low-SOC shutdown threshold. 0 disables this function. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: BMS Low SOC Switch To Grid
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.

visible_if.reason: BMS telemetry is not available on this device.

capabilities.change_summary: Changes the BMS low-SOC threshold for switching to grid. 0 disables this function. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.

capabilities.title: BMS High SOC Switch To Battery
capabilities.support_notes: Protocol-level JSDSOLAR command candidate for EyeBond G-ASCII devices. Expose only in Full control until verified on the specific inverter model.

visible_if.reason: BMS telemetry is not available on this device.

capabilities.change_summary: Changes the BMS high-SOC threshold for switching back to battery. 0 disables this function. Document-backed, not yet model-verified.
